creator: jrm@freebsd.org
text:
Adam,

My apologies.  I am indeed using the radeon (not the radeonhd) driver.
 I must have clicked on the wrong link at freebsd.org/ports, which
filled in the subject line.  I can confirm that this is still a
problem on 8.2-RELEASE.

--
